content.text: ResNet-50 achieves 93.2% top-1 accuracy on CIFAR-10 and 76.1% on ImageNet. A fine-tuned ViT-B/16 reaches 98.1% on CIFAR-10.

target: Should extract ResNet-50 (93.2% CIFAR-10, 76.1% ImageNet) and ViT-B/16 (98.1% CIFAR-10).

content.text: GPT-4 scores 86.4% on the MMLU benchmark, while its distilled variant GPT-4-mini scores 78.9% on the same benchmark.

target: Should extract GPT-4 (86.4% MMLU) and GPT-4-mini (78.9% MMLU).

content.text: The Segment Anything Model (SAM) achieves a mean IoU of 87.1% on the COCO segmentation benchmark, compared to 81.3% for the prior Mask R-CNN baseline.

target: Should extract SAM (87.1% COCO mIoU) and Mask R-CNN (81.3% COCO mIoU).

content.text: Whisper-large reaches a word error rate of 4.3% on LibriSpeech test-clean, improving on wav2vec 2.0's 6.1% on the same split.

target: Should extract Whisper-large (4.3% WER on LibriSpeech test-clean) and wav2vec 2.0 (6.1% WER on LibriSpeech test-clean).
